case_title: LABOR COMMISSIONER, STATE OF CALIFORNIA VS. IMMERSION TRAVEL CORPS, a Caifornia Corporation

docket_entries.description: UNDER APPLICATION TO THE CLERK FOR JUDGMENT UNDER SEC 585(1) C.C.P., IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF LABOR COMMISSIONER, STATE OF CALIFORNIA RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT IMMERSION TRAVEL CORPS, A CALIFORNIA CORPORATION $11,230.76 PRINCIPAL, $746.87 INTEREST, $370.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $12,347.63, SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT
